name: Green Olivada
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (20 ounces) pitted good quality green olives
1/2 cup extra virgin olive oil (if the olives are packed in olive oil, then use the oil from the jar)
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Puree until smooth.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Transfer mixture to a jar.
5. Pour 1/4-inch of olive oil over the top to preserve.
6. Refrigerate for up to 2 weeks or freeze for longer storage.
Yield: 2 cups
